Fit a log-linear Poisson growth model

Source: R/fit_poisson_growth.R
fit_poisson_growth.Rd

Fits a Poisson regression of incidence on time and reports growth rate, confidence interval, and doubling time.

Usage

fit_poisson_growth(
  data,
  date_col = "date",
  count_col = "incidence",
  n_draws = 0L,
  mean_si = 4.7,
  seed = NULL
)

Arguments

data

A data frame with date and incidence columns.

date_col

Name of date column.

count_col

Name of incidence/count column.

n_draws

Number of uncertainty draws from the asymptotic Normal distribution of the growth coefficient. Set to 0 to skip.

mean_si

Mean serial interval used to map growth-rate draws to implied R_t draws via exp(growth_rate * mean_si).

seed

Optional random seed used when n_draws > 0.

Value

A list with model object, coefficient summary tibble, fitted values, and (optionally) growth-rate uncertainty draws.
